name: dev-core
description: Codex-native development workflows for TDD, architecture patterns, systematic debugging, verification, review, and continuous learning.

interface.shortDescription: TDD, verification, review, and architecture workflows.
interface.longDescription: Dev Core packages Codex-native skills for test-driven implementation, systematic debugging, refactoring, verification loops, code review, frontend and backend architecture patterns, and continuous improvement. It converts the Claude command-oriented workflow into focused Codex skills with progressive disclosure.
defaultPrompt: Use dev-core to plan and verify this coding task.
Use dev-workflow to debug this issue from root cause.
Review this change with the verification loop.
